text.title: Product Development Trends 2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: retry retrieval with stricter date filter
score all 6 buckets and emit verdicts + 2025 retro

example.trace: year=2026 -> freshness=pass -> 6 buckets scored, 2025 retro emitted.

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
